= document.createElement('div'); wrapper.className = 'pdf-print-root'; wrapper.style.background = '#ffffff'; wrapper.style.padding = '16px 20px'; wrapper.style.boxSizing = 'border-box'; const headerClone = root.querySelector('.hdr') ? root.querySelector('.hdr').cloneNode(true) : null; if(headerClone) { sanitizeClone(headerClone); wrapper.appendChild(headerClone); } const activeClone = activeTabEl.cloneNode(true); activeClone.classList.remove('hidden'); activeClone.style.display = 'block'; sanitizeClone(activeClone); await replaceCanvasesWithImages(activeTabEl, activeClone); wrapper.appendChild(activeClone); const html = buildPrintHtml(wrapper.outerHTML); printWindow.onload = function() { setTimeout(function() { try { printWindow.document.title = filename; } catch(e) {} try { printWindow.focus(); } catch(e) {} try { printWindow.print(); } catch(e) {} }, 500); }; if ('onafterprint' in printWindow) { printWindow.onafterprint = function() { setTimeout(function() { try { printWindow.close(); } catch(e) {} }, 150); }; } printWindow.document.open(); printWindow.document.write(html); printWindow.document.close(); } catch(err) { console.error('Falha ao exportar PDF:', err); try { printWindow.close(); } catch(e) {} alert('Não foi possível preparar o PDF.'); } finally { window.__pdfExportRunning = false; setBusy(false); } })(); } function fmt(n,d){d=d||0;if(n==null||isNaN(n))return'—';return n.toLocaleString('pt-BR',{minimumFractionDigits:d,maximumFractionDigits:d})} Chart.register(ChartDataLabels); function isDarkTheme(){return document.body.classList.contains('dark')} function chartThemeColors(){return isDarkTheme()?{text:'#e6edf3',muted:'#9db0c1',grid:'#2a3a4e'}:{text:'#1a2e22',muted:'#5a7265',grid:'#e8ede9'}} function syncThemeButton(){const b=document.getElementById('themeBtn');if(b)b.textContent=isDarkTheme()?'☀️ Light':'🌙 Dark'} function applyThemeToAllCharts(){ if(typeof Chart==='undefined')return; const c=chartThemeColors(); Chart.defaults.color=c.text; Chart.defaults.borderColor=c.grid; Chart.defaults.font=Chart.defaults.font||{}; Chart.defaults.font.family='Plus Jakarta Sans'; const insts=Chart.instances?Object.values(Chart.instances):[]; insts.forEach(chart=>{ try{ if(!chart||!chart.options)return; chart.options.plugins=chart.options.plugins||{}; if(chart.options.plugins.legend&&chart.options.plugins.legend.labels)chart.options.plugins.legend.labels.color=c.muted; if(chart.options.plugins.datalabels&&typeof chart.options.plugins.datalabels.color!=='function')chart.options.plugins.datalabels.color=c.text; if(chart.options.scales){ Object.values(chart.options.scales).forEach(sc=>{ if(!sc)return; sc.ticks=sc.ticks||{}; sc.ticks.color=c.muted; if(sc.title)sc.title.color=c.muted; if(sc.grid&&sc.grid.display!==false)sc.grid.color=c.grid; }); } chart.update(); }catch(e){} }); } function toggleTheme(){ document.body.classList.toggle('dark'); try{localStorage.setItem('cct_theme', isDarkTheme()?'dark':'light')}catch(e){} syncThemeButton(); setTimeout(applyThemeToAllCharts,40); } (function(){ try{if(localStorage.getItem('cct_theme')==='dark')document.body.classList.add('dark')}catch(e){} setTimeout(()=>{syncThemeButton();applyThemeToAllCharts()},120); })(); let corteRendered=false,carregRendered=false,transpRendered=false,rtkRendered=false; let rtkFrente='todas',rtkDtStart='',rtkDtEnd='',rtkTipo='todos'; function isHiddenRtkFrente(f){const s=String(f==null?'':f).trim();return s==='0'||s==='000'} function normalizeRtkFrente(f){const s=String(f==null?'':f).trim();return isHiddenRtkFrente(s)?'':s} function switchTab(t){activeTab=t;document.querySelectorAll('.tab').forEach((b,i)=>b.classList.toggle('on',i===t));['tab0','tab1','tab2','tab3','tab4','tab5','tab6','tab7'].forEach((id,i)=>document.getElementById(id).classList.toggle('hidden',i!==t));if(t===0||t===1){renderProd();return}if(t===2){if(DATA_P&&DATA_P!=='null'){if(!perdasRendered){initPerdas();perdasRendered=true}else{renderPerdasAll()}}return}if(t===3){renderRtkTab();rtkRendered=true;return}if(t===4){if(OV&&OV!=='null'){renderOverviewFull();ovRendered=true}return}if(t===5){if(OV&&OV!=='null'){renderCorteDetail();corteRendered=true}return}if(t===6){if(OV&&OV!=='null'){renderCarregamentoDetail();carregRendered=true}return}if(t===7){if(OV&&OV!=='null'){renderTransporteDetail();transpRendered=true}}} function toggleMonth(m){if(m==='Todos')selM=['Todos'];else{if(selM.includes('Todos'))selM=[];if(selM.includes(m)){selM=selM.filter(x=>x!==m);if(!selM.length)selM=['Todos']}else selM.push(m)};renderProd()} function fD(){var dd=D.d.filter(d=>d.mt!=null);if(!selM.includes('Todos'))dd=dd.filter(d=>selM.includes(d.mes));var ds=document.getElementById('dt1s'),de=document.getElementById('dt1e');if(ds&&ds.value)dd=dd.filter(d=>d.dia>=ds.value);if(de&&de.value)dd=dd.filter(d=>d.dia<=de.value);return dd} function calcAtrPeriodo(rows){var num=0,den=0;rows.forEach(d=>{FR.forEach(f=>{var ton=d['r'+f],atr=d['a'+f];if(ton!=null&&atr!=null&&ton>0){num+=atr*ton;den+=ton}})});return den>0?num/den:null} function getMaisPalhaValue(fr=''){if(!OV)return null;var rows=fr?(OV.mais_palha_fr||[]).filter(r=>String(r.fr)===String(fr)):(OV.mais_palha||[]);if(!selM.includes('Todos'))rows=rows.filter(r=>selM.includes(r.mes));var ds=document.getElementById('dt1s'),de=document.getElementById('dt1e');if(ds&&ds.value)rows=rows.filter(r=>r.dt>=ds.value);if(de&&de.value)rows=rows.filter(r=>r.dt<=de.value);var he=0,hd=0;rows.forEach(r=>{he+=r.he||0;hd+=r.hd||0});return he>0?(hd/he*100):null} function rF(){document.getElementById('flt').innerHTML=['Todos'].concat(MO).map(m=>'').join('')} function renderProd(){rF();if(activeTab===0)renderTab0();else if(activeTab===1)renderTab1();setTimeout(()=>{if(typeof applyThemeToAllCharts==='function')applyThemeToAllCharts()},40)} function renderTab0(){var dd=fD(),el=document.getElementById('content-tab0');var tM=0,tP=0;dd.forEach(d=>{tM+=d.mt||0;tP+=d.mp||0});var f1=FR[0];var fi=dd.filter(d=>d['i'+f1]);var fr2=dd.filter(d=>d['k'+f1]);var fd=dd.filter(d=>d['d'+f1]);var aA=calcAtrPeriodo(dd),aI=0,aR=0,aD2=0,mpal=getMaisPalhaValue();if(fi.length)fi.forEach(d=>aI+=d['i'+f1]/fi.length);if(fr2.length)fr2.forEach(d=>aR+=d['k'+f1]/fr2.length);if(fd.length)fd.forEach(d=>aD2+=d['d'+f1]/fd.length);var mx=tM>0?(tP/tM*100):0;var mT=0,rT=0;MO.forEach(m=>{if(selM.includes('Todos')||selM.includes(m)){mT+=D.m.meta_ipa[m]||0;rT+=D.m.real_u[m]||0}});if(selM.includes('Todos')){mT=D.m.meta_ipa.Total;rT=D.m.real_u.Total};var pM=mT>0?(rT/mT*100):0;document.getElementById('spct').textContent='Safra: '+fmt(pM,1)+'%';var ld=dd[dd.length-1];document.getElementById('sdt').textContent=ld?'Último: '+ld.dia:'';var h='
Moagem Total
'+fmt(tM)+'
ton
'+fmt(pM,1)+'% da meta
Moagem Própria
'+fmt(tP)+'
Mix '+fmt(mx,1)+'%
ATR Médio
'+(aA!=null?fmt(aA,1):'—')+'
Impureza
'+fmt(aI,1)+'%
% Despontador
'+(mpal!=null?fmt(mpal,1)+'%':'—')+'
Raio
'+fmt(aR,1)+' km
Dens Carga
'+fmt(aD2,1)+'
';h+='
Moagem Diária vs Plano
Meta vs Realizado
ATR Médio
Impureza Média
Mix e Raio
';h+='
Resumo Mensal
';MO.forEach(m=>{var mi=D.m.meta_ipa[m]||0,ri=D.m.real_u[m]||0,pi=mi>0?ri/mi*100:0;var mp2=D.m.meta_p[m]||0,rp=D.m.real_p[m]||0,pp=mp2>0?rp/mp2*100:0;h+=''});var ti=D.m.meta_ipa.Total||0,tri=D.m.real_u.Total||0,tp=D.m.meta_p.Total||0,trp=D.m.real_p.Total||0;h+='
MêsMeta IPARealizado%Meta PrópReal Próp%
'+m+''+fmt(mi)+''+fmt(ri)+''+fmt(pi,1)+'%'+fmt(mp2)+''+fmt(rp)+''+fmt(pp,1)+'%
TOTAL'+fmt(ti)+''+fmt(tri)+''+fmt(tri/ti*100,1)+'%'+fmt(tp)+''+fmt(trp)+''+fmt(trp/tp*100,1)+'%
';el.innerHTML=h;renderMC(dd)} function renderMC(dd){Object.keys(ch).forEach(k=>{if(k[0]==='m')ch[k].destroy()});var gc='#e8ede9',tc2='#5a7265';Chart.defaults.color=tc2;Chart.defaults.font.family='Plus Jakarta Sans';var dlC={display:'auto',color:'#5a7265',font:{family:'JetBrains Mono',size:9,weight:'bold'},anchor:'end',align:'top',formatter:v=>v>0?fmt(v,1):''};var dlC0={display:'auto',color:'#5a7265',font:{family:'JetBrains Mono',size:9,weight:'bold'},anchor:'end',align:'top',formatter:v=>v>0?fmt(v,0):''};var x1=document.getElementById('mc1');if(x1)ch.mc1=new Chart(x1,{type:'bar',data:{labels:dd.map(d=>d.dia.slice(5)),datasets:[{label:'Moagem',data:dd.map(d=>d.mt),backgroundColor:'rgba(0,132,61,.2)',borderColor:'#00843D',borderWidth:1,borderRadius:3,order:2},{label:'Plano',data:dd.map(()=>2448.5),type:'line',borderColor:'#e17055',borderWidth:2,borderDash:[6,3],pointRadius:0,order:1,fill:false}]},options:{layout:{padding:{top:20}},responsive:true,maintainAspectRatio:false,plugins:{datalabels:dlC0,legend:{labels:{color:tc2}}},scales:{x:{ticks:{color:tc2,font:{size:8},maxRotation:45,autoSkip:true,maxTicksLimit:30},grid:{color:gc}},y:{ticks:{color:tc2,callback:v=>fmt(v)},grid:{color:gc}}}}});var ms=MO.filter(m=>(D.m.meta_ipa[m]||0)>0||(D.m.real_u[m]||0)>0);var x2=document.getElementById('mc2');if(x2)ch.mc2=new Chart(x2,{type:'bar',data:{labels:ms,datasets:[{label:'Meta',data:ms.map(m=>D.m.meta_ipa[m]||0),backgroundColor:'rgba(225,112,85,.25)',borderColor:'#e17055',borderWidth:1.5,borderRadius:4},{label:'Real',data:ms.map(m=>D.m.real_u[m]||0),backgroundColor:'rgba(0,132,61,.2)',borderColor:'#00843D',borderWidth:1.5,borderRadius:4}]},options:{layout:{padding:{top:20}},responsive:true,maintainAspectRatio:false,plugins:{datalabels:dlC0},scales:{x:{grid:{color:gc}},y:{ticks:{callback:v=>(v/1000)+'k'},grid:{color:gc}}}}});var f1=FR[0];var avgA=MO.map(m=>{var d=D.d.filter(r=>r.mes===m&&r.mt!=null);return d.length?calcAtrPeriodo(d):null});var x3=document.getElementById('mc3');if(x3)ch.mc3=new Chart(x3,{type:'line',data:{labels:MO,datasets:[{data:avgA,borderColor:'#00b894',backgroundColor:'rgba(0,184,148,.08)',fill:true,tension:.3,pointBackgroundColor:'#00b894',pointRadius:5,borderWidth:2.5}]},options:{layout:{padding:{top:20}},responsive:true,maintainAspectRatio:false,plugins:{datalabels:dlC,legend:{display:false}},scales:{x:{grid:{color:gc}},y:{grid:{color:gc}}}}});var avgI=MO.map(m=>{var d=D.d.filter(r=>r.mes===m&&r['i'+f1]);if(!d.length)return null;var s=0;d.forEach(r=>s+=r['i'+f1]);return s/d.length});var x4=document.getElementById('mc4');if(x4)ch.mc4=new Chart(x4,{type:'bar',data:{labels:MO,datasets:[{data:avgI,backgroundColor:avgI.map(v=>v>8?'rgba(214,48,49,.3)':'rgba(0,132,61,.2)'),borderColor:avgI.map(v=>v>8?'#d63031':'#00843D'),borderWidth:1.5,borderRadius:4}]},options:{layout:{padding:{top:20}},responsive:true,maintainAspectRatio:false,plugins:{datalabels:dlC,legend:{display:false}},scales:{x:{grid:{color:gc}},y:{grid:{color:gc}}}}});var avgMx=MO.map(m=>{var d=D.d.filter(r=>r.mes===m&&r.mix_p);if(!d.length)return null;var s=0;d.forEach(r=>s+=r.mix_p);return s/d.length});var avgR=MO.map(m=>{var d=D.d.filter(r=>r.mes===m&&r['k'+f1]);if(!d.length)return null;var s=0;d.forEach(r=>s+=r['k'+f1]);return s/d.length});var x5=document.getElementById('mc5');if(x5)ch.mc5=new Chart(x5,{type:'bar',data:{labels:MO,datasets:[{label:'Mix%',data:avgMx,backgroundColor:'rgba(108,92,231,.2)',borderColor:'#6c5ce7',borderWidth:1.5,borderRadius:4,yAxisID:'y'},{label:'Raio',data:avgR,type:'line',borderColor:'#e17055',pointBackgroundColor:'#e17055',pointRadius:4,borderWidth:2,yAxisID:'y1'}]},options:{layout:{padding:{top:20}},responsive:true,maintainAspectRatio:false,plugins:{datalabels:dlC},scales:{x:{grid:{color:gc}},y:{position:'left',grid:{color:gc}},y1:{position:'right',grid:{display:false}}}}})} function calcFr(dd){return FR.map(f=>{var rows=dd.filter(d=>d['r'+f]!=null);var tR=0,wA=0,wI=0,wK=0,wD=0,tA=0,tI=0,tK=0,tD=0;rows.forEach(d=>{tR+=d['r'+f]||0;if(d['a'+f]){wA+=d['a'+f]*d['r'+f];tA+=d['r'+f]};if(d['i'+f]){wI+=d['i'+f]*d['r'+f];tI+=d['r'+f]};if(d['k'+f]){wK+=d['k'+f]*d['r'+f];tK+=d['r'+f]};if(d['d'+f]){wD+=d['d'+f]*d['r'+f];tD+=d['r'+f]}});return{f:f,days:rows.length,real:tR,atr:tA>0?wA/tA:0,imp:tI>0?wI/tI:0,raio:tK>0?wK/tK:0,dc:tD>0?wD/tD:0,mix:0}})} function calcMF(){return MO.map(m=>{var dd=D.d.filter(d=>d.mes===m&&d.mt!=null);var fr3=calcFr(dd);var tot=0;fr3.forEach(x=>tot+=x.real);fr3.forEach(x=>x.mix=tot>0?x.real/tot*100:0);return{mes:m,frentes:fr3,totalMoagem:tot}}).filter(x=>x.totalMoagem>0)} function renderTab1(){ var dd=fD(); var fr3=calcFr(dd); var tot=0; fr3.forEach(x=>{tot+=x.real;x.palha=getMaisPalhaValue(x.f)}); fr3.forEach(x=>x.mix=tot>0?x.real/tot*100:0); var h='
Resumo por Frente
'; fr3.forEach(x=>{ var ic=x.imp>8?'var(--red)':x.imp>6?'var(--am)':'var(--rz)'; h+='
Frente '+x.f+'
Moagem'+fmt(x.real)+' t
Mix'+fmt(x.mix,1)+'%
ATR'+fmt(x.atr,1)+'
Impureza'+fmt(x.imp,1)+'%

Dias'+x.days+'
% Despontador'+(x.palha!=null?fmt(x.palha,1)+'%':'—')+'

'; h+='
Análise de Gaps
'; var maxATR=0;fr3.forEach(x=>{if(x.atr>maxATR)maxATR=x.atr}); var best=fr3[0];fr3.forEach(x=>{if(x.atr>best.atr)best=x}); var sA=fr3.slice().sort((a,b)=>b.atr-a.atr); h+='

ATR por Frente

Impureza por Frente (%)

'; sI.forEach(x=>{var pct=maxImp>0?(x.imp/maxImp*100):0;var diff=x.imp-bestImp.imp;var bc=x.imp>10?'#d63031':x.imp>8?'#e17055':FC[x.f];h+='
'+x.f+'
'+fmt(x.imp,1)+'%
';var dv2=diff===0?'MELHOR':'+'+fmt(diff,1)+'pp';h+='
'+dv2+'

'; document.getElementById('content-tab1').innerHTML=h; renderFC(); } function renderFC(){Object.keys(ch).forEach(k=>{if(k[0]==='f')ch[k].destroy()});var mf=calcMF();var labels=mf.map(x=>x.mes);var gc='#e8ede9';function gd(prop){return FR.map(f=>({label:'F'+f,data:mf.map(x=>{var v=null;x.frentes.forEach(y=>{if(y.f===f&&y[prop]>0)v=y[prop]});return v}),borderColor:FC[f],backgroundColor:FCD[f],tension:.3,pointRadius:4,pointBackgroundColor:FC[f],borderWidth:2.5,spanGaps:true}))}var dlO={color:'#1a2e22',font:{weight:'bold',size:9,family:'JetBrains Mono'},backgroundColor:'rgba(255,255,255,0.75)',borderRadius:3,padding:{top:2,bottom:2,left:4,right:4},offset:2,display:ctx=>ctx.dataIndex===ctx.dataset.data.length-1,formatter:v=>v?fmt(v,1):''};var dlC1={display:'auto',color:'#5a7265',font:{family:'JetBrains Mono',size:9,weight:'bold'},anchor:'end',align:'top',formatter:v=>v>0?fmt(v,1):''};var dlC0={display:'auto',color:'#5a7265',font:{family:'JetBrains Mono',size:9,weight:'bold'},anchor:'end',align:'top',formatter:v=>v>0?fmt(v,0):''};var opts={layout:{padding:{top:20,right:30}},responsive:true,maintainAspectRatio:false,plugins:{datalabels:dlO,legend:{labels:{color:'#5a7265'}}},scales:{x:{grid:{color:gc}},y:{grid:{color:gc}}}};var c1=document.getElementById('fc1');if(c1)ch.fc1=new Chart(c1,{type:'line',data:{labels:labels,datasets:gd('atr')},options:opts});var c2=document.getElementById('fc2');if(c2)ch.fc2=new Chart(c2,{type:'line',data:{labels:labels,datasets:gd('imp')},options:opts});var c3=document.getElementById('fc3');if(c3){var ds3=FR.map(f=>({label:'F'+f,data:mf.map(x=>{var v=0;x.frentes.forEach(y=>{if(y.f===f)v=y.mix});return v}),backgroundColor:FCD[f],borderColor:FC[f],borderWidth:1.5,borderRadius:3}));ch.fc3=new Chart(c3,{type:'bar',data:{labels:labels,datasets:ds3},options:{layout:{padding:{top:20}},responsive:true,maintainAspectRatio:false,plugins:{datalabels:dlC1,legend:{labels:{color:'#5a7265'}}},scales:{x:{stacked:true,grid:{color:gc}},y:{stacked:true,grid:{color:gc}}}}})}var c4=document.getElementById('fc4');if(c4){var ds4=FR.map(f=>({label:'F'+f,data:mf.map(x=>{var v=0;x.frentes.forEach(y=>{if(y.f===f)v=y.real});return v}),backgroundColor:FCD[f],borderColor:FC[f],borderWidth:1.5,borderRadius:3}));ch.fc4=new Chart(c4,{type:'bar',data:{labels:labels,datasets:ds4},options:{layout:{padding:{top:20}},responsive:true,maintainAspectRatio:false,plugins:{datalabels:dlC0,legend:{labels:{color:'#5a7265'}}},scales:{x:{grid:{color:gc}},y:{ticks:{callback:v=>(v/1000)+'k'},grid:{color:gc}}}}})}} function getStatusP(val){if(val>META_P)return'red';if(val>=META_P-TOL_P)return'yellow';return'green'} function getStatusLabelP(val){const s=getStatusP(val);if(s==='red')return'⚠️ Acima';if(s==='yellow')return'🟡 Atenção';return'✅ Dentro'} function statusPillP(val){const s=getStatusP(val);return`${getStatusLabelP(val)}`} function rankClassP(i){if(i<=2)return'p-rank-1';if(i<=4)return'p-rank-2';if(i<=6)return'p-rank-3';return'p-rank-default'} function groupByP(data,keys){const map={};const fields=['agr_touceira','agr_palmito','cana_inteira','rebolo','pedaco','estilhaco','lasca'];data.forEach(r=>{const key=keys.map(k=>r[k]).join('|');if(!map[key]){map[key]={count:0,_sum:0,_cols:{}};keys.forEach(k=>map[key][k]=r[k]);fields.forEach(c=>map[key]._cols[c]=0)};map[key].count+=r.count;map[key]._sum+=(r.media*r.count);fields.forEach(c=>{map[key]._cols[c]+=(r[c]||0)*r.count})});return Object.values(map).map(g=>{const out={count:g.count,media:g._sum/g.count};keys.forEach(k=>out[k]=g[k]);fields.forEach(c=>{out[c]=g._cols[c]/g.count});return out})} function getFilteredRawP(){return DATA_P.raw.filter(r=>(currentFilterP==='all'||String(r.frente)===currentFilterP)&&(currentSemanaP==='all'||r.semana===currentSemanaP)&&(currentFazendaP==='all'||String(r.fazenda)===currentFazendaP)&&(currentZonaP==='all'||String(r.zona)===currentZonaP))} function initPerdas(){if(!DATA_P||!DATA_P.raw){document.getElementById('tab2').innerHTML='
Aba Base colheita não encontrada.
';return};const fEl=document.getElementById('p-filters');let h=`
Frente
`;DATA_P.frentes.forEach(f=>h+=``);h+=`
Semana
`;h+=`
Fazenda
`;h+=`
Zona
`;fEl.innerHTML=h;renderPerdasAll()} function setFilterP(f){currentFilterP=f;document.querySelectorAll('.p-filter-btn[data-frente]').forEach(b=>b.classList.toggle('active',b.dataset.frente===String(f)));renderPerdasAll()} function setSemanaP(s){currentSemanaP=s;renderPerdasAll()} function setFazendaP(fz){currentFazendaP=fz;renderPerdasAll()} function setZonaP(z){currentZonaP=z;renderPerdasAll()} function renderPerdasAll(){const fr=getFilteredRawP();if(!fr.length){document.getElementById('p-kpiRow').innerHTML='
Sem dados para este filtro.
';document.getElementById('p-breakdownGrid').innerHTML='';document.getElementById('p-rankingBody').innerHTML='';document.getElementById('p-detailBody').innerHTML='';if(chartFrenteInst)chartFrenteInst.destroy();if(chartTurnoInst)chartTurnoInst.destroy();return};const agg=groupByP(fr,['dummy'])[0];const s=getStatusP(agg.media);const eqFr=groupByP(fr,['equip','frente']);const above=eqFr.filter(r=>r.media>META_P).length;const attn=eqFr.filter(r=>r.media>=META_P-TOL_P&&r.media<=META_P).length;document.getElementById('p-kpiRow').innerHTML=`
Média Geral
${fmt(agg.media,2)} kg
${statusPillP(agg.media)}
Avaliações
${agg.count.toLocaleString('pt-BR')}
Acima Meta
${above}
Em Atenção
${attn}
`;const items=[{key:'pedaco',label:'Pedaço'},{key:'agr_touceira',label:'Agr.Touceira'},{key:'lasca',label:'Lasca'},{key:'cana_inteira',label:'Cana Inteira'},{key:'rebolo',label:'Rebolo'},{key:'estilhaco',label:'Estilhaço'},{key:'agr_palmito',label:'Agr.Palmito'}].sort((a,b)=>(agg[b.key]||0)-(agg[a.key]||0));const mx=Math.max(...items.map(i=>agg[i.key]||0));document.getElementById('p-breakdownGrid').innerHTML=items.map(i=>{const v=agg[i.key]||0;const p=mx>0?(v/mx*100):0;return`
${i.label}
${fmt(v,2)}
`}).join('');const fD2=groupByP(fr,['frente']).sort((a,b)=>b.media-a.media);chartFrenteInst=makeBarP('chartFrente',fD2.map(r=>'Fr '+r.frente),fD2.map(r=>r.media),chartFrenteInst);const tD2=groupByP(fr,['turno']).sort((a,b)=>a.turno.localeCompare(b.turno));chartTurnoInst=makeBarP('chartTurno',tD2.map(r=>'T '+r.turno),tD2.map(r=>r.media),chartTurnoInst);const mxM=Math.max(...eqFr.map(r=>r.media),META_P);document.getElementById('p-rankingBody').innerHTML=eqFr.sort((a,b)=>b.media-a.media).map((r,i)=>{const s2=getStatusP(r.media);const bp=(r.media/(mxM*1.1))*100;return`${i+1}${r.equip}${r.frente}${r.count}${fmt(r.media,2)}
${statusPillP(r.media)}${fmt(r.agr_touceira,2)}${fmt(r.agr_palmito,2)}${fmt(r.cana_inteira,2)}${fmt(r.rebolo,2)}${fmt(r.pedaco,2)}${fmt(r.estilhaco,2)}${fmt(r.lasca,2)}`}).join('');const dD2=groupByP(fr,['equip','frente','fazenda','zona','turno']).sort((a,b)=>b.media-a.media);document.getElementById('p-detailBody').innerHTML=dD2.map((r,i)=>{const s2=getStatusP(r.media);const bp=(r.media/(mxM*1.1))*100;return`${i+1}${r.equip}${r.frente}${r.fazenda}${r.zona}T ${r.turno}${r.count}${fmt(r.media,2)}
${statusPillP(r.media)}`}).join('')} function makeBarP(id,labels,values,inst){if(inst)inst.destroy();const chartInst=new Chart(document.getElementById(id).getContext('2d'),{type:'bar',data:{labels,datasets:[{data:values,backgroundColor:values.map(v=>{const s=getStatusP(v);return s==='red'?'rgba(214,48,49,.7)':s==='yellow'?'rgba(225,112,85,.7)':'rgba(0,132,61,.7)'}),borderColor:values.map(v=>{const s=getStatusP(v);return s==='red'?'#d63031':s==='yellow'?'#e17055':'#00843D'}),borderWidth:1,borderRadius:4}]},options:{responsive:true,maintainAspectRatio:false,layout:{padding:{top:30}},plugins:{legend:{display:false},datalabels:{display:true,color:'#1a2e22',anchor:'end',align:'top',font:{family:'JetBrains Mono',size:11,weight:'bold'},formatter:v=>fmt(v,2)}},scales:{y:{beginAtZero:true,grid:{color:'#e8ede9'}},x:{grid:{display:false}}}},plugins:[{afterDraw(c){const ctx2=c.ctx;const y=c.scales.y.getPixelForValue(META_P);ctx2.save();ctx2.strokeStyle='#d63031';ctx2.lineWidth=1.5;ctx2.setLineDash([6,4]);ctx2.beginPath();ctx2.moveTo(c.scales.x.left,y);ctx2.lineTo(c.scales.x.right,y);ctx2.stroke();ctx2.fillStyle='#d63031';ctx2.font='10px JetBrains Mono';ctx2.fillText('META '+fmt(META_P,2),c.scales.x.right-60,y-5);ctx2.restore()}}]});setTimeout(()=>{if(typeof applyThemeToAllCharts==='function')applyThemeToAllCharts()},20);return chartInst} function killOvChart(id){if(ovCharts[id]){ovCharts[id].destroy();delete ovCharts[id]}} function mkOvChart(id,cfg){killOvChart(id);const el=document.getElementById(id);if(!el)return;ovCharts[id]=new Chart(el.getContext('2d'),cfg);setTimeout(()=>{if(typeof applyThemeToAllCharts==='function')applyThemeToAllCharts()},20)} function getOvFleet(f){ if(!OV||!OV.raw_bordo)return f==='todas'?[...(OV.fleet||[])]:((OV.fleet||[]).filter(r=>r.frente===f)); const trips=(OV.raw_trips||[]).filter(t=>(f==='todas'||t.fr===f)&&(!ovDtStart||t.dt>=ovDtStart)&&(!ovDtEnd||t.dt<=ovDtEnd)); const bordo=(OV.raw_bordo||[]).filter(b=>(!ovDtStart||b.dt>=ovDtStart)&&(!ovDtEnd||b.dt<=ovDtEnd)); const eqFr={};trips.forEach(t=>{if(!eqFr[t.eq])eqFr[t.eq]=t.fr}); const eqs=new Set([...trips.map(t=>t.eq),...bordo.map(b=>b.eq)]); const out=[]; eqs.forEach(eq=>{ const fr2=eqFr[eq]||(OV.fleet||[]).find(x=>x.equip===eq)?.frente||''; if(f!=='todas'&&fr2!==f)return; const bt=trips.filter(t=>t.eq===eq);const bb=bordo.filter(b=>b.eq===eq); const sumB=(k)=>bb.reduce((s,r)=>s+(r[k]||0),0); const vpv=sumB('vpv'),hov=sumB('hov'),vpc=sumB('vpc'),hoc=sumB('hoc'); const tot=sumB('tot');if(tot<=0)return; out.push({ equip:eq,frente:fr2, velVazio:hov>0?Math.round(vpv/hov*100)/100:0, velCarreg:hoc>0?Math.round(vpc/hoc*100)/100:0, t1:bt.length?Math.round(bt.reduce((s,t)=>s+t.t1,0)/bt.length*10)/10:0, t2:bt.length?Math.round(bt.reduce((s,t)=>s+t.t2,0)/bt.length*10)/10:0, t3:bt.length?Math.round(bt.reduce((s,t)=>s+(t.t3||0),0)/bt.length*10)/10:0, t4:bt.length?Math.round(bt.reduce((s,t)=>s+(t.t4||0),0)/bt.length*10)/10:0, raio:bt.filter(t=>t.raio>0).length?Math.round(bt.filter(t=>t.raio>0).reduce((s,t)=>s+t.raio,0)/bt.filter(t=>t.raio>0).length*100)/100:0, densidade:bt.filter(t=>t.dens>0).length?Math.round(bt.filter(t=>t.dens>0).reduce((s,t)=>s+t.dens,0)/bt.filter(t=>t.dens>0).length*100)/100:0, manut:Math.round(sumB('man')*100)/100,agTransb:Math.round(sumB('ag')*100)/100, semApont:Math.round(sumB('sa')*100)/100,patio:Math.round(sumB('pat')*100)/100, totalH:Math.round(tot*100)/100, pctOfensor:Math.round((sumB('man')+sumB('ag')+sumB('pat'))/tot*1000)/10, }); }); return out; } function renderOverviewFull(){ if(!OV||!OV.kpis){document.getElementById('overviewContent').innerHTML='
Arquivo Metricas_cct_dashboard.xlsx não encontrado ou sem abas de apoio.
';return} const minDt=OV.dates&&OV.dates.length?OV.dates[0]:''; const maxDt=OV.dates&&OV.dates.length?OV.dates[OV.dates.length-1]:''; if(!document.getElementById('ovDtS')||!document.getElementById('ovDtS').value){ovDtStart=minDt;ovDtEnd=maxDt} let fh='
Frente
'; OV.frentes.forEach(f=>{const act=f===ovFrente?'active':'';const lbl=f==='todas'?'Todas':'Frente '+f;fh+=``}); fh+=`
Período
até`; fh+='
'; const d=OV.kpis[ovFrente]||OV.kpis['todas']; const M=OV.metas; const tcdOk=d.tcd.real>=d.tcd.meta; const pctTcd=d.tcd.meta>0?((d.tcd.real/d.tcd.meta)*100).toFixed(1):'0'; function kpiCard(item){ const ok=item.higher_is_better?item.real>=item.meta:item.real<=item.meta; const click=item.tab!==undefined?` style="cursor:pointer" onclick="switchTab(${item.tab})"`:'' return`
${item.name}
${fmt(item.real)}
Meta: ${fmt(item.meta)} ${item.unit}
${ok?'✓':'!'}
`; } let h = fh; h+=`
Indicador Supremo
TCD — Toneladas de Cana por Dia
Realizado${fmt(d.tcd.real,2)} ton
Meta${fmt(d.tcd.meta)} ton
Atingimento${pctTcd}%
${tcdOk?'✅ BATEU TCD':'⚠️ NÃO BATEU'}
`; h+=`
✂️ CORTE ver detalhe →
${(d.corte||[]).map(kpiCard).join('')}
🚜 CARREGAMENTO ver detalhe →
${(d.carreg||[]).map(kpiCard).join('')}
🚚 TRANSPORTE ver detalhe →
${(d.transp||[]).map(kpiCard).join('')}
`; document.getElementById('overviewContent').innerHTML=h; } function setOvFrente(f){ovFrente=f;ovRendered=false;renderOverviewFull();ovRendered=true} function renderCorteDetail(){ if(!OV||!OV.corte_fr)return; const minDt=OV.dates&&OV.dates.length?OV.dates[0]:''; const maxDt=OV.dates&&OV.dates.length?OV.dates[OV.dates.length-1]:''; let h='
Frente
'; OV.frentes.forEach(f=>{const act=f===ovFrente?'active':'';const lbl=f==='todas'?'Todas':'Frente '+f;h+=``}); h+=`
Período
até`; h+='
'; const cfList=ovFrente==='todas'?OV.corte_fr:OV.corte_fr.filter(c=>c.frente===ovFrente); h+='
'; cfList.forEach(cf=>{ const mnOk=cf.manobraReal<=cf.manobraMeta||cf.manobraReal===0; h+=`
${cf.frente} Frente ${cf.frente}
`; h+=`
`; h+=`
Vel. Corte
${fmt(cf.velCorte,2)}
km/h
`; h+=`
Manobra
${fmt(cf.manobraReal,1)}%
Meta: ${fmt(cf.manobraMeta,1)}%
`; h+=`
ATR
${fmt(cf.atr,1)}
kg/ton
`; h+=`
Chuva
${fmt(cf.chuvaHMaq,1)}
h/maq
`; h+=`
Hrs Efetivo
${fmt(cf.hrsEfReal,1)}
Meta: ${fmt(cf.hrsEfMeta,1)} h
`; h+=`
% Corte
${fmt(cf.pctCorte,1)}%
do tempo total
`; h+=`
Prod. Colhedora
${fmt(cf.prodColhedora, 2)}
ton/maq/dia
`; h+=`
NSO
${fmt(cf.nso, 1)}%
Nível de Serviço
`; h+=`
`; h+=`
`; h+=`
Corte ${fmt(cf.corteH,1)}h
Manobra ${fmt(cf.manobraH,1)}h
Chuva ${fmt(cf.chuvaH,1)}h
`; h+=`
Limit.Ind ${fmt(cf.limitIndH,1)}h
Manut ${fmt(cf.manutH,1)}h
Pátio ${fmt(cf.patioH,1)}h
`; h+=`
`; }); h+='
'; h+=`
Distribuição de Horas por Colhedora (Frota)
`; if(OV.raw_bordo_cd&&OV.raw_bordo_cd.length>0){ h+=`
Ofensores por Colhedora (Frota) — Detalhe de Horas
FrotaFrenteCorte (h)Manobra (h)Desloc. (h)Chuva (h)Limit.Ind (h)Manut (h)Pátio (h)S/Apont (h)Total (h)Vel Corte% Corte% Manobra
`; } if(OV.raw_op_cd&&OV.raw_op_cd.length>0){ h+=`
🏆 Ranking por Operador — Detalhe de Horas
OperadorFrenteFrotasCorte (h)Manobra (h)Desloc. (h)Chuva (h)Limit.Ind (h)Manut (h)Pátio (h)S/Apont (h)Outros (h)Total (h)Vel Corte% Corte% Manobra
`; } document.getElementById('corteContent').innerHTML=h; renderOvCorteChart2(); const tfHead = document.querySelector('#tCorteFrota thead'); if(tfHead) tfHead.addEventListener('click',e=>{const th=e.target.closest('th.sort');if(!th)return;const c=th.dataset.col;if(corteFrotaSortCol===c)corteFrotaSortDir=corteFrotaSortDir==='asc'?'desc':'asc';else{corteFrotaSortCol=c;corteFrotaSortDir='desc'}renderCorteFrotaTable()}); const toHead = document.querySelector('#tCorteOp thead'); if(toHead) toHead.addEventListener('click',e=>{const th=e.target.closest('th.sort');if(!th)return;const c=th.dataset.col;if(corteOpSortCol===c)corteOpSortDir=corteOpSortDir==='asc'?'desc':'asc';else{corteOpSortCol=c;corteOpSortDir='desc'}renderCorteOpTable()}); if(OV.raw_bordo_cd&&OV.raw_bordo_cd.length>0) renderCorteFrotaTable(); if(OV.raw_op_cd&&OV.raw_op_cd.length>0) renderCorteOpTable(); } function renderCorteFrotaTable(){ if(!OV.raw_bordo_cd||!OV.raw_bordo_cd.length)return; const rows=OV.raw_bordo_cd.filter(r=>(ovFrente==='todas'||r.fr===ovFrente) && (!ovDtStart||r.dt>=ovDtStart) && (!ovDtEnd||r.dt<=ovDtEnd)); const agg={}; rows.forEach(r=>{ const k=r.eq+'|'+r.fr; if(!agg[k])agg[k]={eq:r.eq,fr:r.fr,co:0,mn:0,ds:0,ch:0,li:0,ma:0,pa:0,sa:0,tot:0,vpC:0,hoC:0}; const a=agg[k];a.co+=r.co;a.mn+=r.mn;a.ds+=r.ds;a.ch+=r.ch;a.li+=r.li;a.ma+=r.ma;a.pa+=r.pa;a.sa+=r.sa;a.tot+=r.tot;a.vpC+=r.vpC;a.hoC+=r.hoC; }); let list=Object.values(agg).filter(a=>a.tot>0).map(a=>{ a.vel = a.hoC>0?(a.vpC/a.hoC):0; a.pCorte = a.tot>0?(a.co/a.tot*100):0; a.pMan = a.tot>0?(a.mn/a.tot*100):0; return a; }); list.sort((a,b)=>{ let va = a[corteFrotaSortCol]; let vb = b[corteFrotaSortCol]; if(typeof va==='string'){ return corteFrotaSortDir==='asc'?va.localeCompare(vb):vb.localeCompare(va); } return corteFrotaSortDir==='asc'?va-vb:vb-va; }); const tb=document.getElementById('corteFrotaBody'); if(!tb)return; let h=''; list.forEach(a=>{ const vel = a.hoC>0?fmt(a.vel,2):'—'; const pCorte = fmt(a.pCorte,1); const pMan = fmt(a.pMan,1); h+=`${a.eq}${a.fr}${fmt(a.co,1)}${fmt(a.mn,1)}${fmt(a.ds,1)}${fmt(a.ch,1)}${fmt(a.li,1)}${fmt(a.ma,1)}${fmt(a.pa,1)}${fmt(a.sa,1)}${fmt(a.tot,1)}${vel}${pCorte}%${pMan}%`; }); tb.innerHTML=h; document.querySelectorAll('#tCorteFrota th.sort').forEach(th=>{th.classList.remove('asc','desc');if(th.dataset.col===corteFrotaSortCol)th.classList.add(corteFrotaSortDir)}); } function renderCorteOpTable(){ if(!OV.raw_op_cd||!OV.raw_op_cd.length)return; const rowsOp=OV.raw_op_cd.filter(r=>(ovFrente==='todas'||r.fr===ovFrente) && (!ovDtStart||r.dt>=ovDtStart) && (!ovDtEnd||r.dt<=ovDtEnd)); const agg={}; rowsOp.forEach(r=>{ const k=r.op+'|'+r.fr; if(!agg[k])agg[k]={op:r.op,fr:r.fr,frotas:{},co:0,mn:0,ds:0,ch:0,li:0,ma:0,pa:0,sa:0,ot:0,tot:0,vpC:0,hoC:0}; const a=agg[k]; a.frotas[r.eq]=1; const d=r.desc;const h2=r.h; if(d==='CORTE DE CANA MECANIZADO'){a.co+=h2;a.vpC+=r.vpC;a.hoC+=r.hoC} else if(d==='MANOBRA')a.mn+=h2; else if(d==='DESLOCAMENTO')a.ds+=h2; else if(d.indexOf('CLIMATICA')>-1||d==='TEMPO INDETERMINADO')a.ch+=h2; else if(d==='LIMITAÇÃO INDÚSTRIA')a.li+=h2; else if(d.indexOf('MAN CORRETIVA')>-1||d.indexOf('AGUARDANDO MANUT')>-1||d==='TROCA DE FAQUINHA'||d.indexOf('LIMPEZA')>-1)a.ma+=h2; else if(d==='PATIO - RESERVA')a.pa+=h2; else if(d==='SEM APONTAMENTO')a.sa+=h2; else a.ot+=h2; a.tot+=h2; }); let list=Object.values(agg).filter(a=>a.tot>0).map(a=>{ a.vel = a.hoC>0?(a.vpC/a.hoC):0; a.pCorte = a.tot>0?(a.co/a.tot*100):0; a.pMan = a.tot>0?(a.mn/a.tot*100):0; return a; }); list.sort((a,b)=>{ let va = a[corteOpSortCol]; let vb = b[corteOpSortCol]; if(typeof va==='string'){ return corteOpSortDir==='asc'?va.localeCompare(vb):vb.localeCompare(va); } return corteOpSortDir==='asc'?va-vb:vb-va; }); const tb=document.getElementById('corteOpBody'); if(!tb)return; let h=''; list.forEach(a=>{ const vel = a.hoC>0?fmt(a.vel,2):'—'; const pCorte = fmt(a.pCorte,1); const pMan = fmt(a.pMan,1); const frs=Object.keys(a.frotas).join(', '); h+=`${a.op}${a.fr}${frs}${fmt(a.co,1)}${fmt(a.mn,1)}${fmt(a.ds,1)}${fmt(a.ch,1)}${fmt(a.li,1)}${fmt(a.ma,1)}${fmt(a.pa,1)}${fmt(a.sa,1)}${fmt(a.ot,1)}${fmt(a.tot,1)}${vel}${pCorte}%${pMan}%`; }); tb.innerHTML=h; document.querySelectorAll('#tCorteOp th.sort').forEach(th=>{th.classList.remove('asc','desc');if(th.dataset.col===corteOpSortCol)th.classList.add(corteOpSortDir)}); } function renderOvCorteChart2(){ if(!OV.raw_bordo_cd||!OV.raw_bordo_cd.length)return; const rows=OV.raw_bordo_cd.filter(r=>(ovFrente==='todas'||r.fr===ovFrente) && (!ovDtStart||r.dt>=ovDtStart) && (!ovDtEnd||r.dt<=ovDtEnd)); const agg={}; rows.forEach(r=>{ if(!agg[r.eq])agg[r.eq]={eq:r.eq,fr:r.fr,co:0,mn:0,ds:0,ch:0,li:0,ma:0,pa:0,sa:0}; const a=agg[r.eq];a.co+=r.co;a.mn+=r.mn;a.ds+=r.ds;a.ch+=r.ch;a.li+=r.li;a.ma+=r.ma;a.pa+=r.pa;a.sa+=r.sa; }); const list=Object.values(agg).sort((a,b)=>(b.co+b.mn+b.ds+b.ch+b.li+b.ma+b.pa+b.sa)-(a.co+a.mn+a.ds+a.ch+a.li+a.ma+a.pa+a.sa)); if(!list.length)return; const JK="'Plus Jakarta Sans'"; const labels=list.map(a=>a.eq+' ('+a.fr+')'); mkOvChart('ovCorteChart2',{type:'bar',data:{labels,datasets:[ {label:'Corte',data:list.map(a=>a.co),backgroundColor:'#00843D',borderRadius:3}, {label:'Manobra',data:list.map(a=>a.mn),backgroundColor:'#e17055',borderRadius:3}, {label:'Deslocamento',data:list.map(a=>a.ds),backgroundColor:'#0984e3',borderRadius:3}, {label:'Chuva',data:list.map(a=>a.ch),backgroundColor:'#74b9ff',borderRadius:3}, {label:'Limit.Ind',data:list.map(a=>a.li),backgroundColor:'#fdcb6e',borderRadius:3}, {label:'Manut',data:list.map(a=>a.ma),backgroundColor:'#d63031',borderRadius:3}, {label:'Pátio',data:list.map(a=>a.pa),backgroundColor:'#636e72',borderRadius:3}, {label:'S/Apont',data:list.map(a=>a.sa),backgroundColor:'#a29bfe',borderRadius:3}, ]},options:{responsive:true,maintainAspectRatio:false,layout:{padding:{top:20}},scales:{x:{stacked:true,ticks:{font:{family:JK,size:9,weight:'600'}},grid:{display:false}},y:{stacked:true,title:{display:true,text:'Horas',font:{family:JK,size:10}},grid:{color:'#eee'}}},plugins:{legend:{position:'top',labels:{font:{family:JK,size:10},usePointStyle:true,pointStyleWidth:9,padding:12}},datalabels:{display:'auto',anchor:'center',align:'center',color:'#fff',font:{family:'JetBrains Mono',size:8,weight:'bold'},formatter:v=>v>=3?fmt(v,0)+'h':''},tooltip:{callbacks:{label:c=>' '+c.dataset.label+': '+fmt(c.parsed.y,1)+'h'}}}}}); } function setCorteFrente(f){ovFrente=f;corteRendered=false;renderCorteDetail();corteRendered=true} function getOvCarregRows(f){ if(!OV||!OV.raw_carreg_tb)return []; return OV.raw_carreg_tb.filter(r=>(f==='todas'||r.fr===f)&&(!ovDtStart||r.dt>=ovDtStart)&&(!ovDtEnd||r.dt<=ovDtEnd)); } function classifyCarregDesc(desc){ const d=(desc||'').toUpperCase(); if(d==='REBOQUE TRANSBORDO')return'rb'; if(d==='MANOBRA')return'mn'; if(d.indexOf('DESLOCAMENTO VAZIO')>-1)return'dv'; if(d.indexOf('DESLOCAMENTO CARREGADO')>-1)return'dc'; if(d==='AGUARDANDO CARREGAMENTO'||d==='COLHEDORA PARADA'||d==='AGUARDANDO OPERADOR DESLOCAR PARA COLHEDORA')return'ag'; if(d==='BASCULAMENTO'||d==='AGUARDANDO BASCULAMENTO')return'bs'; if(d.indexOf('CLIMATICA')>-1||d.indexOf('CLIMÁTICA')>-1||d.indexOf('TEMPO INDETERMINADO')>-1)return'ch'; if(d.indexOf('LIMITAÇÃO IND')>-1||d.indexOf('LIMITACAO IND')>-1)return'li'; if(d.indexOf('MAN CORRETIVA')>-1||d.indexOf('AGUARDANDO MANUT')>-1||d.indexOf('LIMPEZA')>-1||d.indexOf('ABASTECIMENTO')>-1)return'ma'; if(d==='PATIO - RESERVA'||d==='EQUIPAMENTO DISPONÍVEL'||d==='EQUIPAMENTO DISPONIVEL')return'pa'; if(d==='SEM APONTAMENTO')return'sa'; if(d==='FALTA DE CAMINHÃO'||d==='FALTA DE CAMINHAO')return'fc'; return'ot'; } function renderCarregamentoDetail(){ const hasCards=OV&&OV.carreg_fr&&OV.carreg_fr.length; const hasRows=OV&&OV.raw_carreg_tb&&OV.raw_carreg_tb.length; if(!hasCards&&!hasRows){document.getElementById('carregamentoContent').innerHTML='
Sem dados de carregamento por transbordo nas abas de apoio.
';return;} const minDt=OV.dates&&OV.dates.length?OV.dates[0]:''; const maxDt=OV.dates&&OV.dates.length?OV.dates[OV.dates.length-1]:''; const rows=getOvCarregRows(ovFrente); const cfList=ovFrente==='todas'?(OV.carreg_fr||[]):(OV.carreg_fr||[]).filter(c=>c.frente===ovFrente); const dispMeta=cfList.length?cfList[0].dispTbMeta:88; const nsMeta=cfList.length?cfList[0].nsTbMeta:97; let h='
Frente
'; OV.frentes.forEach(f=>{const act=f===ovFrente?'active':'';const lbl=f==='todas'?'Todas':'Frente '+f;h+=``}); h+=`
Período
até`; h+='
'; if(!rows.length&&hasRows){document.getElementById('carregamentoContent').innerHTML=h+'
Sem dados para os filtros selecionados.
';return;} const agg={}; let totalH=0,reboque=0,manobra=0,agCarreg=0,manut=0,patio=0,semApont=0,faltaCaminhao=0,velNum=0,velDen=0; rows.forEach(r=>{ totalH+=r.totalH||0;reboque+=r.reboque||0;manobra+=r.manobra||0;agCarreg+=r.agCarreg||0;manut+=r.manut||0;patio+=r.patio||0;semApont+=r.semApont||0;faltaCaminhao+=r.faltaCaminhao||0; velNum+=(r.velReboque||0)*(r.reboque||0);velDen+=r.reboque||0; const k=(r.eq||'')+'|'+(r.fr||''); if(!agg[k])agg[k]={eq:r.eq,fr:r.fr,rb:0,mn:0,dv:0,dc:0,ag:0,bs:0,ch:0,li:0,ma:0,pa:0,sa:0,fc:0,ot:0,tot:0,velNum:0,velDen:0,pRb:0,pMn:0,pOf:0}; const a=agg[k]; a.rb+=r.reboque||0;a.mn+=r.manobra||0;a.dv+=r.deslocVazio||0;a.dc+=r.deslocCarreg||0;a.ag+=r.agCarreg||0;a.bs+=r.bascDesc||0;a.ch+=r.chuva||0;a.li+=r.limitInd||0;a.ma+=r.manut||0;a.pa+=r.patio||0;a.sa+=r.semApont||0;a.fc+=r.faltaCaminhao||0;a.ot+=r.outros||0;a.tot+=r.totalH||0;a.velNum+=(r.velReboque||0)*(r.reboque||0);a.velDen+=r.reboque||0; }); const list=Object.values(agg).filter(a=>a.tot>0).map(a=>{a.vel=a.velDen>0?(a.velNum/a.velDen):0;a.pRb=a.tot>0?(a.rb/a.tot*100):0;a.pMn=a.tot>0?(a.mn/a.tot*100):0;a.pOf=a.tot>0?((a.mn+a.ag+a.ma+a.pa+a.sa+a.fc+a.ot)/a.tot*100):0;a.disp=a.tot>0?(1-((a.ma+a.pa+a.sa)/a.tot))*100:0;a.ns=a.tot>0?(1-((a.mn+a.ag+a.fc)/a.tot))*100:0;return a;}).sort((a,b)=>b.rb-a.rb); const dispTb=totalH>0?(1-((manut+patio+semApont)/totalH))*100:0; const nsTb=totalH>0?(1-((manobra+agCarreg+faltaCaminhao)/totalH))*100:0; const velMed=velDen>0?(velNum/velDen):0; const hrsReboqueEf=cfList.length?cfList.reduce((s,c)=>s+(c.hrsReboqueEfetivo||0),0)/cfList.length:(list.length?list.reduce((s,c)=>s+(c.rb||0),0)/Math.max(list.length,1):0); h+=`
Transbordos
${list.length}
equipamentos no período
Reboque
${fmt(reboque,1)}
horas totais
Disp. TB
${fmt(dispTb,1)}%
Meta: ${fmt(dispMeta,1)}%
NS TB
${fmt(nsTb,1)}%
Meta: ${fmt(nsMeta,1)}%
Vel. Reboque
${fmt(velMed,1)}
km/h ponderado
Hrs Reb. Efetivo
${fmt(hrsReboqueEf,1)}
h / transbordo
`; if(cfList.length){ h+='
'; cfList.forEach(cf=>{ const velVOk=cf.velVazioReal>=cf.velVazioMeta||cf.velVazioReal===0; const velCOk=cf.velCarregReal>=cf.velCarregMeta||cf.velCarregReal===0; const dispOk=cf.dispTb>=cf.dispTbMeta||cf.dispTb===0; const nsOk=cf.nsTb>=cf.nsTbMeta||cf.nsTb===0; const ofOk=cf.pctOfensores<=55||cf.pctOfensores===0; h+=`
${cf.frente} Frente ${cf.frente} • ${cf.numTb} TB
`; h+=`
`; h+=`
Vel. TB Vazio
${fmt(cf.velVazioReal,2)}
Meta: ${fmt(cf.velVazioMeta,2)} km/h
`; h+=`
Vel. TB Carreg.
${fmt(cf.velCarregReal,2)}
Meta: ${fmt(cf.velCarregMeta,2)} km/h
`; h+=`
Disp. TB
${fmt(cf.dispTb,1)}%
Meta: ${fmt(cf.dispTbMeta,1)}%
`; h+=`
NS TB
${fmt(cf.nsTb,1)}%
Meta: ${fmt(cf.nsTbMeta,1)}%
`; h+=`
Hrs Reb. Efetivo
${fmt(cf.hrsReboqueEfetivo,1)}
h / transbordo
`; h+=`
% Reboque
${fmt(cf.pctReboque,1)}%
do tempo total
`; h+=`
% Manobra
${fmt(cf.pctManobra,1)}%
do tempo total
`; h+=`
% Ofensores
${fmt(cf.pctOfensores,1)}%
falta cam. + manut. + pátio
`; h+=`
`; h+=`
`; h+=`
Reboque ${fmt(cf.reboqueH,1)}h
Manobra ${fmt(cf.manobraH,1)}h
Ag.Carreg ${fmt(cf.agCarregH,1)}h
`; h+=`
Falta Caminhão ${fmt(cf.faltaCaminhaoH,1)}h
Manut ${fmt(cf.manutH,1)}h
Pátio/Disp ${fmt(cf.patioH,1)}h
`; h+=`
`; }); h+='
'; } h+=`
Distribuição de Horas por Transbordo (Esquerda: 353 | Centro: 352 | Direita: 351)
Ofensores do Carregamento (Esquerda: 353 | Centro: 352 | Direita: 351)
`; if(rows.length){ h+=`
Ofensores por Transbordo (Frota) — Detalhe de Horas
FrotaFrenteReboque (h)Manobra (h)Desl.V (h)Desl.C (h)Ag.Carreg. (h)Basc./Desc. (h)Manut (h)Pátio (h)S/Apont (h)Falta Cam. (h)Outros (h)Total (h)Vel. Reboque% Reboque% Manobra% OfensoresDisp.TBNS TB
`; } if(OV.raw_op_tb&&OV.raw_op_tb.length){ h+=`
🏆 Ranking por Operador — Detalhe de Horas
OperadorFrenteFrotasReboque (h)Manobra (h)Desl.V (h)Desl.C (h)Ag.Carreg. (h)Basc./Desc. (h)Chuva (h)Limit.Ind (h)Manut (h)Pátio (h)S/Apont (h)Falta Cam. (h)Outros (h)Total (h)Vel. Reboque% Reboque% Manobra
`; } document.getElementById('carregamentoContent').innerHTML=h; renderCarregamentoCharts(); const tfHead=document.querySelector('#tCarregFrota thead'); if(tfHead) tfHead.addEventListener('click',e=>{const th=e.target.closest('th.sort');if(!th)return;const c=th.dataset.col;if(carregFrotaSortCol===c)carregFrotaSortDir=carregFrotaSortDir==='asc'?'desc':'asc';else{carregFrotaSortCol=c;carregFrotaSortDir='desc'}renderCarregamentoFrotaTable()}); const toHead=document.querySelector('#tCarregOp thead'); if(toHead) toHead.addEventListener('click',e=>{const th=e.target.closest('th.sort');if(!th)return;const c=th.dataset.col;if(carregOpSortCol===c)carregOpSortDir=carregOpSortDir==='asc'?'desc':'asc';else{carregOpSortCol=c;carregOpSortDir='desc'}renderCarregamentoOpTable()}); if(rows.length) renderCarregamentoFrotaTable(); if(OV.raw_op_tb&&OV.raw_op_tb.length) renderCarregamentoOpTable(); } function renderCarregamentoFrotaTable(){ const rows=getOvCarregRows(ovFrente); if(!rows.length)return; const agg={}; rows.forEach(r=>{ const k=(r.eq||'')+'|'+(r.fr||''); if(!agg[k])agg[k]={eq:r.eq,fr:r.fr,rb:0,mn:0,dv:0,dc:0,ag:0,bs:0,ma:0,pa:0,sa:0,fc:0,ot:0,tot:0,velNum:0,velDen:0,pRb:0,pMn:0,pOf:0,disp:0,ns:0}; const a=agg[k]; a.rb+=r.reboque||0;a.mn+=r.manobra||0;a.dv+=r.deslocVazio||0;a.dc+=r.deslocCarreg||0;a.ag+=r.agCarreg||0;a.bs+=r.bascDesc||0;a.ma+=r.manut||0;a.pa+=r.patio||0;a.sa+=r.semApont||0;a.fc+=r.faltaCaminhao||0;a.ot+=r.outros||0;a.tot+=r.totalH||0;a.velNum+=(r.velReboque||0)*(r.reboque||0);a.velDen+=r.reboque||0; }); let list=Object.values(agg).filter(a=>a.tot>0).map(a=>{a.vel=a.velDen>0?(a.velNum/a.velDen):0;a.pRb=a.tot>0?(a.rb/a.tot*100):0;a.pMn=a.tot>0?(a.mn/a.tot*100):0;a.pOf=a.tot>0?((a.mn+a.ag+a.ma+a.pa+a.sa+a.fc+a.ot)/a.tot*100):0;a.disp=a.tot>0?(1-((a.ma+a.pa+a.sa)/a.tot))*100:0;a.ns=a.tot>0?(1-((a.mn+a.ag+a.fc)/a.tot))*100:0;return a;}); list.sort((a,b)=>{let va=a[carregFrotaSortCol],vb=b[carregFrotaSortCol];if(typeof va==='string')return carregFrotaSortDir==='asc'?String(va).localeCompare(String(vb)):String(vb).localeCompare(String(va));return carregFrotaSortDir==='asc'?va-vb:vb-va;}); const tb=document.getElementById('carregFrotaBody'); if(!tb)return; let h=''; list.forEach(a=>{ h+=`${a.eq}${a.fr||'—'}${fmt(a.rb,1)}${fmt(a.mn,1)}${fmt(a.dv,1)}${fmt(a.dc,1)}${fmt(a.ag,1)}${fmt(a.bs,1)}${fmt(a.ma,1)}${fmt(a.pa,1)}${fmt(a.sa,1)}${fmt(a.fc,1)}${fmt(a.ot,1)}${fmt(a.tot,1)}${a.vel>0?fmt(a.vel,2):'—'}${fmt(a.pRb,1)}%${fmt(a.pMn,1)}%${fmt(a.pOf,1)}%${fmt(a.disp,1)}%${fmt(a.ns,1)}%`; }); tb.innerHTML=h; document.querySelectorAll('#tCarregFrota th.sort').forEach(th=>{th.classList.remove('asc','desc');if(th.dataset.col===carregFrotaSortCol)th.classList.add(carregFrotaSortDir)}); } function renderCarregamentoOpTable(){ if(!OV.raw_op_tb||!OV.raw_op_tb.length)return; const rows=OV.raw_op_tb.filter(r=>(ovFrente==='todas'||r.fr===ovFrente)&&(!ovDtStart||r.dt>=ovDtStart)&&(!ovDtEnd||r.dt<=ovDtEnd)); const agg={}; rows.forEach(r=>{ const k=(r.op||'')+'|'+(r.fr||''); if(!agg[k])agg[k]={op:r.op,fr:r.fr,frotas:{},rb:0,mn:0,dv:0,dc:0,ag:0,bs:0,ch:0,li:0,ma:0,pa:0,sa:0,fc:0,ot:0,tot:0,vpR:0,hoR:0}; const a=agg[k]; a.frotas[r.eq]=1; const bucket=classifyCarregDesc(r.desc); a[bucket]+=r.h||0; a.tot+=r.h||0; if(bucket==='rb'){a.vpR+=r.vpR||0;a.hoR+=r.hoR||0;} }); let list=Object.values(agg).filter(a=>a.tot>0).map(a=>{a.vel=a.hoR>0?(a.vpR/a.hoR):0;a.pRb=a.tot>0?(a.rb/a.tot*100):0;a.pMn=a.tot>0?(a.mn/a.tot*100):0;return a;}) list.sort((a,b)=>{let va=a[carregOpSortCol],vb=b[carregOpSortCol];if(typeof va==='string')return carregOpSortDir==='asc'?String(va).localeCompare(String(vb)):String(vb).localeCompare(String(va));return carregOpSortDir==='asc'?va-vb:vb-va;}); const tb=document.getElementById('carregOpBody'); if(!tb)return; let h=''; list.forEach(a=>{ h+=`${a.op}${a.fr||'—'}${Object.keys(a.frotas).join(', ')}${fmt(a.rb,1)}${fmt(a.mn,1)}${fmt(a.dv,1)}${fmt(a.dc,1)}${fmt(a.ag,1)}${fmt(a.bs,1)}${fmt(a.ch,1)}${fmt(a.li,1)}${fmt(a.ma,1)}${fmt(a.pa,1)}${fmt(a.sa,1)}${fmt(a.fc,1)}${fmt(a.ot,1)}${fmt(a.tot,1)}${a.vel>0?fmt(a.vel,2):'—'}${fmt(a.pRb,1)}%${fmt(a.pMn,1)}%`; }); tb.innerHTML=h; document.querySelectorAll('#tCarregOp th.sort').forEach(th=>{th.classList.remove('asc','desc');if(th.dataset.col===carregOpSortCol)th.classList.add(carregOpSortDir)}); } function renderCarregamentoCharts(){ const rows = getOvCarregRows(ovFrente); if(!rows.length) return; const JK = "'Plus Jakarta Sans'"; const byFleet = {}; rows.forEach(r => { const k = (r.eq||'') + ' (' + (r.fr||'—') + ')'; if(!byFleet[k]) byFleet[k] = {label: k, fr: r.fr, rb:0, mn:0, ag:0, fc:0, ma:0, pa:0, sa:0, tot:0, off:0}; const a = byFleet[k]; a.rb += r.reboque||0; a.mn += r.manobra||0; a.ag += r.agCarreg||0; a.fc += r.faltaCaminhao||0; a.ma += r.manut||0; a.pa += r.patio||0; a.sa += r.semApont||0; a.tot += r.totalH||0; a.off += (r.manobra||0) + (r.agCarreg||0) + (r.faltaCaminhao||0) + (r.manut||0) + (r.patio||0) + (r.semApont||0); }); const sortLogic = (a, b, field) => { const frA = String(a.fr || ''); const frB = String(b.fr || ''); if (frA !== frB) return frB.localeCompare(frA); return b[field] - a[field]; }; const listDist = Object.values(byFleet).sort((a,b) => sortLogic(a,b,'tot')); const listOff = Object.values(byFleet).sort((a,b) => sortLogic(a,b,'off')); const labelCfg = { display: 'auto', anchor: 'center', align: 'center', color: '#fff', font: {family: 'JetBrains Mono', size: 9, weight: 'bold'}, formatter: v => v >= 3 ? fmt(v, 0) + 'h' : '' }; mkOvChart('cargChart1', { type: 'bar', data: { labels: listDist.map(r=>r.label), datasets: [ {label:'Reboque', data:listDist.map(r=>r.rb), backgroundColor:'#00843D', borderRadius:3}, {label:'Manobra', data:listDist.map(r=>r.mn), backgroundColor:'#e17055', borderRadius:3}, {label:'Ag.Carreg.', data:listDist.map(r=>r.ag), backgroundColor:'#fdcb6e', borderRadius:3}, {label:'Falta Cam.', data:listDist.map(r=>r.fc), backgroundColor:'#74b9ff', borderRadius:3}, {label:'Manut', data:listDist.map(r=>r.ma), backgroundColor:'#d63031', borderRadius:3}, {label:'Pátio/S.Ap', data:listDist.map(r=>r.pa+r.sa), backgroundColor:'#636e72', borderRadius:3} ] }, options: { responsive: true, maintainAspectRatio: false, layout: {padding: {top: 20}}, scales: { x: {stacked: true, ticks: {font: {family: JK, size: 10, weight: '600'}, maxRotation: 45, minRotation: 45}, grid: {display: false}}, y: {stacked: true, title: {display: true, text: 'Horas', font: {family: JK, size: 10}}, grid: {color: '#eee'}} }, plugins: { legend: {position: 'top', labels: {font: {family: JK, size: 10}, usePointStyle: true, pointStyleWidth: 9, padding: 10}}, datalabels: labelCfg, tooltip: {callbacks: {label: c => ' ' + c.dataset.label + ': ' + fmt(c.parsed.y, 1) + 'h'}} } } }); mkOvChart('cargChart2', { type: 'bar', data: { labels: listOff.map(r=>r.label), datasets: [ {label:'Manobra', data:listOff.map(r=>r.mn), backgroundColor:'#e17055', borderRadius:3}, {label:'Ag.Carreg.', data:listOff.map(r=>r.ag), backgroundColor:'#fdcb6e', borderRadius:3}, {label:'Falta Cam.', data:listOff.map(r=>r.fc), backgroundColor:'#74b9ff', borderRadius:3}, {label:'Manut', data:listOff.map(r=>r.ma), backgroundColor:'#d63031', borderRadius:3}, {label:'Pátio', data:listOff.map(r=>r.pa), backgroundColor:'#636e72', borderRadius:3}, {label:'S/Apont', data:listOff.map(r=>r.sa), backgroundColor:'#a29bfe', borderRadius:3} ] }, options: { responsive: true, maintainAspectRatio: false, layout: {padding: {top: 20}}, scales: { x: {stacked: true, ticks: {font: {family: JK, size: 10, weight: '600'}, maxRotation: 45, minRotation: 45}, grid: {display: false}}, y: {stacked: true, title: {display: true, text: 'Horas', font: {family: JK, size: 10}}, grid: {color: '#eee'}} }, plugins: { legend: {position: 'top', labels: {font: {family: JK, size: 10}, usePointStyle: true, pointStyleWidth: 9, padding: 10}}, datalabels: labelCfg, tooltip: {callbacks: {label: c => ' ' + c.dataset.label + ': ' + fmt(c.parsed.y, 1) + 'h'}} } } }); } // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // TAB 3: ACOMPANHAMENTO PILOTO RTK // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ function renderRtkTab(){ const el=document.getElementById('rtkContent'); if(!RTK||!RTK.length){el.innerHTML='
Base RTK não encontrada.
';return} // Unique frentes from RTK (oculta Frente 000 no filtro) const frsSet=new Set(RTK.map(r=>normalizeRtkFrente(r.fr)).filter(f=>f)); const frs=['todas'].concat(Array.from(frsSet).sort((a,b)=>(Number(a)||9999)-(Number(b)||9999)||String(a).localeCompare(String(b)))); if(isHiddenRtkFrente(rtkFrente)||!frs.includes(rtkFrente))rtkFrente='todas'; const tipos=['todos','Colhedora','Transbordo','Plantadora']; // Date range const dts=RTK.map(r=>r.dt).sort(); const minDt=dts[0]||''; const maxDt=dts[dts.length-1]||''; // Filter button bar let h='
'; h+='
Frente
'; frs.forEach(f=>{const act=f===rtkFrente?'active':'';const lbl=f==='todas'?'Todas':'Frente '+f;h+=``}); h+='
Tipo
'; tipos.forEach(t=>{const act=t===rtkTipo?'active':'';const lbl=t==='todos'?'Todos':t;h+=``}); h+=`
Período
até`; h+=``; h+='
'; // Filter data const rtkF=RTK.filter(r=>{ const fr=normalizeRtkFrente(r.fr); if(rtkFrente!=='todas'&&fr!==rtkFrente)return false; if(rtkTipo!=='todos'&&r.tipo!==rtkTipo)return false; if(rtkDtStart&&r.dtrtkDtEnd)return false; return true; }); // KPIs const nReg=rtkF.length; const utilAvg=nReg?rtkF.reduce((s,r)=>s+r.util,0)/nReg:0; const usoTot=rtkF.reduce((s,r)=>s+r.usoH,0); const durTot=rtkF.reduce((s,r)=>s+r.durH,0); const opsUniq=new Set(rtkF.map(r=>r.op)).size; const frotasUniq=new Set(rtkF.map(r=>r.frota)).size; const frsUniq=new Set(rtkF.map(r=>normalizeRtkFrente(r.fr)).filter(f=>f)).size; const pctAcima90=nReg?rtkF.filter(r=>r.util>=90).length/nReg*100:0; h+='
'; h+=`
Util. Média
${fmt(utilAvg,1)}%
Meta: 90%
`; h+=`
Operadores
${opsUniq}
ativos no período
`; h+=`
Uso Total Piloto
${fmt(usoTot,0)} h
de ${fmt(durTot,0)} h oper.
`; h+=`
% Acima Meta
${fmt(pctAcima90,1)}%
registros ≥90%
`; h+='
'; h+='
'; h+=`
Frotas Ativas
${frotasUniq}
no período
`; h+=`
Frentes
${frsUniq}
com registros
`; h+=`
Registros
${nReg}
dia × operador
`; const dias=new Set(rtkF.map(r=>r.dt)).size; h+=`
Dias Monitorados
${dias}
no período
`; h+='
'; // ═══ VISÃO POR FRENTE (cards por frente) ═══ if(rtkFrente==='todas'){ const frAgg={}; rtkF.forEach(r=>{ const fr=normalizeRtkFrente(r.fr); if(!fr)return; if(!frAgg[fr])frAgg[fr]={fr:fr,ops:new Set(),frotas:new Set(),utilSum:0,usoSum:0,durSum:0,n:0,tipos:{}}; const a=frAgg[fr];a.ops.add(r.op);a.frotas.add(r.frota);a.utilSum+=r.util;a.usoSum+=r.usoH;a.durSum+=r.durH;a.n++; if(!a.tipos[r.tipo])a.tipos[r.tipo]={utilSum:0,n:0}; a.tipos[r.tipo].utilSum+=r.util;a.tipos[r.tipo].n++; }); const frList=Object.values(frAgg).sort((a,b)=>a.fr.localeCompare(b.fr)); if(frList.length){ h+=`
📍 Visão por Frente
`; frList.forEach(a=>{ const utilM=a.n?a.utilSum/a.n:0; const ok=utilM>=90; let tiposHtml=''; Object.keys(a.tipos).forEach(t=>{ const tp=a.tipos[t]; const tpUtil=tp.n?tp.utilSum/tp.n:0; const tpColor=t==='Colhedora'?'#065f46':t==='Transbordo'?'#1e40af':'#5b21b6'; const tpBg=t==='Colhedora'?'#d1fae5':t==='Transbordo'?'#dbeafe':'#ede9fe'; tiposHtml+=`
${t}${fmt(tpUtil,1)}% (${tp.n} reg)
`; }); h+=`
Frente ${a.fr}
${fmt(utilM,1)}%
OPERAD.
${a.ops.size}
FROTAS
${a.frotas.size}
USO (H)
${fmt(a.usoSum,1)}
${tiposHtml}
`; }); h+=`
`; } } // ═══ RANKING POR TIPO ═══ const tiposList=['Colhedora','Transbordo','Plantadora']; tiposList.forEach(tipo=>{ if(rtkTipo!=='todos'&&rtkTipo!==tipo)return; const rtkTp=rtkF.filter(r=>r.tipo===tipo); if(!rtkTp.length)return; const opAgg={}; rtkTp.forEach(r=>{ if(!opAgg[r.op])opAgg[r.op]={op:r.op,nome:r.nome,frotas:new Set(),frs:new Set(),utilSum:0,durSum:0,usoSum:0,n:0}; const a=opAgg[r.op]; const fr=normalizeRtkFrente(r.fr); a.frotas.add(r.frota); if(fr)a.frs.add(fr); a.utilSum+=r.util;a.durSum+=r.durH;a.usoSum+=r.usoH;a.n++; }); const opList=Object.values(opAgg).filter(a=>a.n>0).sort((a,b)=>b.usoSum-a.usoSum); if(!opList.length)return; const tpColor=tipo==='Colhedora'?'#10B981':tipo==='Transbordo'?'#3B82F6':'#8B5CF6'; const tpIcon=tipo==='Colhedora'?'🌾':tipo==='Transbordo'?'🚜':'🌱'; h+=`
${tpIcon} Ranking — ${tipo} (${opList.length} operadores)
`; opList.forEach((a,i)=>{ const utilM=(a.utilSum/a.n); const ok=utilM>=90; const frsStr=Array.from(a.frs).sort((x,y)=>(Number(x)||9999)-(Number(y)||9999)||String(x).localeCompare(String(y))).join(', ')||'—'; const frotasStr=Array.from(a.frotas).join(', '); const medal=i===0?'🥇':i===1?'🥈':i===2?'🥉':(i+1); h+=``; }); h+=`
#OperadorNomeFrente(s)Frota(s)DiasUtil. MédiaUso (h)Duração (h)Status
${medal}${a.op}${a.nome}${frsStr}${frotasStr}${a.n}${fmt(utilM,1)}%${fmt(a.usoSum,1)}${fmt(a.durSum,1)}${ok?'✓ OK':'✗ ABAIXO'}
`; }); el.innerHTML=h; } function setRtkFrente(f){rtkFrente=isHiddenRtkFrente(f)?'todas':f;rtkRendered=false;renderRtkTab();rtkRendered=true} function setRtkTipo(t){rtkTipo=t;rtkRendered=false;renderRtkTab();rtkRendered=true} function setCarregFrente(f){ovFrente=f;carregRendered=false;renderCarregamentoDetail();carregRendered=true} function renderTransporteDetail(){ if(!OV||!OV.fleet)return; // Compute t3/t4 averages per equipment from raw_trips if(OV.raw_trips&&OV.raw_trips.length){ const t34={}; OV.raw_trips.forEach(tr=>{ if(!t34[tr.eq])t34[tr.eq]={t3s:0,t4s:0,n:0}; t34[tr.eq].t3s+=tr.t3||0;t34[tr.eq].t4s+=tr.t4||0;t34[tr.eq].n++; }); OV.fleet.forEach(f=>{ const a=t34[f.equip]; if(a&&a.n>0){f.t3=Math.round(a.t3s/a.n);f.t4=Math.round(a.t4s/a.n)} }); } const minDt=OV.dates&&OV.dates.length?OV.dates[0]:''; const maxDt=OV.dates&&OV.dates.length?OV.dates[OV.dates.length-1]:''; const M=OV.metas;const fl=getOvFleet(ovFrente); const avg=(arr,k)=>arr.length?arr.reduce((s,r)=>s+r[k],0)/arr.length:0; // Compute T1-T4 averages from raw_trips (filtered by date+frente) const tripsF=OV.raw_trips?OV.raw_trips.filter(tr=>{ if(ovFrente!=='todas'&&tr.fr!==ovFrente)return false; if(ovDtStart&&tr.dtovDtEnd)return false; return true; }):[]; const tavg=(k)=>tripsF.length?tripsF.reduce((s,r)=>s+(r[k]||0),0)/tripsF.length:0; const mixTotal=tripsF.length; const gauges=[ {label:'Vel. Vazio (km/h)',val:avg(fl,'velVazio'),meta:M.velVazio,hi:true}, {label:'Vel. Carreg. (km/h)',val:avg(fl,'velCarreg'),meta:M.velCarreg,hi:true}, {label:'Raio (km)',val:avg(fl,'raio'),meta:M.raio,hi:false,neutral:true}, {label:'Densidade (t/v)',val:avg(fl,'densidade'),meta:M.densidade,hi:true}, ]; const gauges2=[ {label:'T1 — Ida (min)',val:tavg('t1'),meta:M.t1,hi:false}, {label:'T2 — Carga (min)',val:tavg('t2'),meta:M.t2,hi:false}, {label:'T3 — Volta (min)',val:tavg('t3'),meta:0,hi:false,neutral:true}, {label:'T4 — Fila+Desc (min)',val:tavg('t4'),meta:M.t4,hi:false}, ]; let h='
Frente
'; OV.frentes.forEach(f=>{const act=f===ovFrente?'active':'';const lbl=f==='todas'?'Todas':'Frente '+f;h+=``}); h+=`
Período
até`; h+='
'; h+='
';gauges.forEach(g=>{const ok=g.neutral?true:(g.hi?g.val>=g.meta:g.val<=g.meta);h+=`
${g.label}
${fmt(g.val,1)}
Meta: ${fmt(g.meta,1)}
`});h+='
'; // T1-T4 gauges (same format as above, 4 cols) h+='
';gauges2.forEach(g=>{const ok=g.neutral?true:(g.val<=g.meta);h+=`
${g.label}
${fmt(g.val,0)}
${g.meta>0?'Meta: '+fmt(g.meta,0)+' min':'—'}
`});h+='
'; // Mix Total row — as percentage (4 cols with mix total single card spanning visually equal) // Mix Fechado Dia % = avg(densidade / densMeta) * 100, clamped // Mix Fechado Dia: média da coluna Mix Própria (%) de 'Dados diários' filtrada por período let mixPct = 0; if(D && D.mix_dia && D.mix_dia.length){ const mFilt = D.mix_dia.filter(m=>{ if(ovDtStart && m.dt < ovDtStart) return false; if(ovDtEnd && m.dt > ovDtEnd) return false; return m.mix > 0; }); if(mFilt.length){ mixPct = mFilt.reduce((s,m)=>s+m.mix, 0) / mFilt.length; } } const mixOk = mixPct >= 95; const nsRows = (OV.vel_fr||[]).filter(v=>ovFrente==='todas' || v.frente===ovFrente); const nsValid = nsRows.filter(v=>Number(v.nsCaminhao||0) > 0); const nsCaminhao = nsValid.length ? nsValid.reduce((s,v)=>s+(Number(v.nsCaminhao)||0),0)/nsValid.length : 0; const nsLabel = ovFrente==='todas' ? 'média das frentes' : 'frente selecionada'; const nsCardClass = nsCaminhao >= 97 ? 'ok' : (nsCaminhao > 0 ? 'bad' : 'ok'); h+=`
MIX FECHADO DIA
${fmt(mixPct,1)}%
Densidade real vs meta
VIAGENS NO PERÍODO
${mixTotal}
viagens totais
NS CAMINHÃO (%)
${nsValid.length?fmt(nsCaminhao,1)+'%':'—'}
${nsLabel} • Apoio_Vel_Frente!N
FROTAS ATIVAS
${fl.length}
no período filtrado
`; let vfr = []; // T1-T4 by front if(OV.vel_fr&&OV.vel_fr.length){ vfr = ovFrente==='todas' ? OV.vel_fr.slice() : OV.vel_fr.filter(v=>v.frente===ovFrente); h+=`
Tempos por Frente (T2 / Viagens / Volume)
FrenteVel VazioVel CarregDensidadeT2 RealT2 MetaRaio RealRaio MetaViagensVolume (T)
`; } // Mix Fechado Dia (ciclo logístico) if(OV.ciclo&&OV.ciclo.length){ h+=`
Mix Fechado Dia — Ciclo Logístico
DataViagensVel VzVel CrT2 (min)T4 (min)RaioDens.Pátio (h)Manut (h)Ag.T (h)S/A (h)Total (h)%Of
`; } h+=`
Vel. Vazio — Ranking Frota
Vel. Carregado — Ranking Frota
`; h+=`
Visão Detalhada da Frota
Equip.Fr.VelocidadeCiclo (min)RaioDens.Ofensores (h)%Of.
VazioCarr.T1T2T3T4Man.Ag.TS/APat.
`; h+=`
Ofensores por Equipamento — Manutenção, Ag.Transbordo, Sem Apont., Pátio (horas)
`; document.getElementById('transporteContent').innerHTML=h; // Store data for sortable tables window._vfr = vfr ? vfr.slice() : []; window._mixCiclo = (OV.ciclo && OV.ciclo.length) ? OV.ciclo.slice() : []; document.querySelector('#tFleet thead').addEventListener('click',e=>{const th=e.target.closest('th.sort');if(!th)return;const c=th.dataset.col;if(ovSortCol===c)ovSortDir=ovSortDir==='asc'?'desc':'asc';else{ovSortCol=c;ovSortDir='desc'};renderTranspFleetTable()}); // Tempos por Frente sort const tTfr = document.querySelector('#tTempoFr thead'); if(tTfr){tTfr.addEventListener('click',e=>{const th=e.target.closest('th.sort');if(!th)return;const c=th.dataset.col;if(window._tfrCol===c)window._tfrDir=window._tfrDir==='asc'?'desc':'asc';else{window._tfrCol=c;window._tfrDir='desc'};renderTempoFr()});} // Mix Fechado sort const tMx = document.querySelector('#tMixDia thead'); if(tMx){tMx.addEventListener('click',e=>{const th=e.target.closest('th.sort');if(!th)return;const c=th.dataset.col;if(window._mxCol===c)window._mxDir=window._mxDir==='asc'?'desc':'asc';else{window._mxCol=c;window._mxDir='desc'};renderMixDia()});} renderTranspFleetTable(); renderTempoFr(); renderMixDia(); renderTranspCharts(); } function setTranspFrente(f){ovFrente=f;transpRendered=false;renderTransporteDetail();transpRendered=true} function renderTranspFleetTable(){ const fl=getOvFleet(ovFrente);const M=OV.metas; fl.sort((a,b)=>ovSortDir==='asc'?a[ovSortCol]-b[ovSortCol]:b[ovSortCol]-a[ovSortCol]); const tb=document.querySelector('#tFleet tbody'); let h=`META${fmt(M.velVazio,0)}${fmt(M.velCarreg,0)}≤${M.t1}≤${fmt(M.t2,0)}—≤${fmt(M.t4,0)}${fmt(M.raio,0)}≥${fmt(M.densidade,0)}—≤${fmt(M.pctOfensor,0)}%`; h+=fl.map(r=>{return`${r.equip}${r.frente}${fmt(r.velVazio,1)}${fmt(r.velCarreg,1)}${fmt(r.t1,0)}${fmt(r.t2,0)}${fmt(r.t3,0)}${fmt(r.t4,0)}${fmt(r.raio,1)}${fmt(r.densidade,1)}${fmt(r.manut,1)}${fmt(r.agTransb,1)}${fmt(r.semApont,1)}${fmt(r.patio,1)}
${fmt(r.pctOfensor,0)}%
`}).join(''); tb.innerHTML=h; document.querySelectorAll('#tFleet th.sort').forEach(th=>{th.classList.remove('asc','desc');if(th.dataset.col===ovSortCol)th.classList.add(ovSortDir)}); } function renderTempoFr(){ const vfr = window._vfr || []; if(!vfr.length) return; const col = window._tfrCol; const dir = window._tfrDir || 'desc'; let list = vfr.slice(); if(col){list.sort((a,b)=>dir==='asc'?(a[col]||0)-(b[col]||0):(b[col]||0)-(a[col]||0));} const tb = document.getElementById('tTempoFrBody'); if(!tb) return; tb.innerHTML = list.map(v=>`${v.frente}${fmt(v.velVReal,1)}${fmt(v.velCReal,1)}${fmt(v.densReal,1)}${fmt(v.t2Real,0)} min${fmt(v.t2Meta,0)} min${fmt(v.raioReal,1)}${fmt(v.raioMeta,1)}${v.viagens}${fmt(v.volume,0)}`).join(''); document.querySelectorAll('#tTempoFr th.sort').forEach(th=>{th.classList.remove('asc','desc');if(th.dataset.col===col)th.classList.add(dir)}); } function renderMixDia(){ const mx = window._mixCiclo || []; if(!mx.length) return; const col = window._mxCol; const dir = window._mxDir || 'desc'; let list = mx.slice(); if(col){list.sort((a,b)=>dir==='asc'?(a[col]||0)-(b[col]||0):(b[col]||0)-(a[col]||0));} const tb = document.getElementById('tMixDiaBody'); if(!tb) return; tb.innerHTML = list.map(c=>`${c.data}${c.viagens}${fmt(c.velVReal,1)}${fmt(c.velCReal,1)}${fmt(c.t2Real,0)}${fmt(c.t4Real,0)}${fmt(c.raioReal,1)}${fmt(c.densReal,1)}${fmt(c.patio,1)}${fmt(c.manut,1)}${fmt(c.agTransb,1)}${fmt(c.semApont,1)}${fmt(c.totalH,0)}${fmt(c.pctOf,1)}%`).join(''); document.querySelectorAll('#tMixDia th.sort').forEach(th=>{th.classList.remove('asc','desc');if(th.dataset.col===col)th.classList.add(dir)}); } function renderTranspCharts(){ const fl=getOvFleet(ovFrente);const M=OV.metas;const JK="'Plus Jakarta Sans'"; const dlCfg={display: 'auto', anchor:'end',align:'top',color:'#1a2e22',font:{family:'JetBrains Mono',size:9,weight:'bold'},formatter:v=>v>0?fmt(v,1):''}; const sv=fl.slice().sort((a,b)=>b.velVazio-a.velVazio); mkOvChart('tVelV',{type:'bar',data:{labels:sv.map(r=>r.equip),datasets:[{data:sv.map(r=>r.velVazio),backgroundColor:sv.map(r=>r.velVazio>=M.velVazio?'#00843D':'#d63031'),borderRadius:3},{type:'line',data:sv.map(()=>M.velVazio),borderColor:'#1a1a2e',borderWidth:1.5,borderDash:[5,3],pointRadius:0}]},options:{responsive:true,maintainAspectRatio:false,layout:{padding:{top:22}},plugins:{legend:{display:false},datalabels:dlCfg},scales:{y:{beginAtZero:true,grid:{color:'#eee'}},x:{ticks:{font:{family:JK,size:9,weight:'600'}},grid:{display:false}}}}}); const sc=fl.slice().sort((a,b)=>b.velCarreg-a.velCarreg); mkOvChart('tVelC',{type:'bar',data:{labels:sc.map(r=>r.equip),datasets:[{data:sc.map(r=>r.velCarreg),backgroundColor:sc.map(r=>r.velCarreg>=M.velCarreg?'#0984e3':'#d63031'),borderRadius:3},{type:'line',data:sc.map(()=>M.velCarreg),borderColor:'#1a1a2e',borderWidth:1.5,borderDash:[5,3],pointRadius:0}]},options:{responsive:true,maintainAspectRatio:false,layout:{padding:{top:22}},plugins:{legend:{display:false},datalabels:dlCfg},scales:{y:{beginAtZero:true,grid:{color:'#eee'}},x:{ticks:{font:{family:JK,size:9,weight:'600'}},grid:{display:false}}}}}); const so=fl.slice().sort((a,b)=>(b.manut+b.agTransb+b.patio)-(a.manut+a.agTransb+a.patio)); mkOvChart('tOfChart',{type:'bar',data:{labels:so.map(r=>r.equip),datasets:[{label:'Manutenção',data:so.map(r=>r.manut),backgroundColor:'#d63031',borderRadius:3},{label:'Ag. Transbordo',data:so.map(r=>r.agTransb),backgroundColor:'#e17055',borderRadius:3},{label:'Sem Apontamento',data:so.map(r=>r.semApont),backgroundColor:'#fdcb6e',borderRadius:3},{label:'Pátio',data:so.map(r=>r.patio),backgroundColor:'#636e72',borderRadius:3}]},options:{responsive:true,maintainAspectRatio:false,scales:{x:{stacked:true,ticks:{font:{family:JK,size:9,weight:'600'}},grid:{display:false}},y:{stacked:true,title:{display:true,text:'Horas',font:{family:JK,size:10}},grid:{color:'#eee'}}},plugins:{legend:{position:'top',labels:{font:{family:JK,size:10},usePointStyle:true,pointStyleWidth:9,padding:12}},datalabels:{display:'auto',anchor:'center',align:'center',color:'#fff',font:{family:'JetBrains Mono',size:9,weight:'bold'},formatter:(v)=>v>=1.5?fmt(v,1):''},tooltip:{callbacks:{label:c=>' '+c.dataset.label+': '+fmt(c.parsed.y,1)+'h'}}}}}); } function parseSortValue(raw, type){ const txt=String(raw==null?'':raw).trim(); if(type==='number'){ const cleaned=txt.replace(/[^0-9,.-]/g,'').replace(/\.(?=\d{3}(?:\D|$))/g,'').replace(',', '.'); const n=parseFloat(cleaned); return isNaN(n)?0:n; } if(type==='auto'){ const cleaned=txt.replace(/[^0-9,.-]/g,'').replace(/\.(?=\d{3}(?:\D|$))/g,'').replace(',', '.'); if(cleaned&&/^[-]?\d/.test(cleaned)){ const n=parseFloat(cleaned); if(!isNaN(n))return n; } } return txt.toLocaleLowerCase('pt-BR'); } function refreshSimpleSortRank(tableId){ const rows=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll(`#${tableId} tbody tr`)); if(tableId==='p-rankingTable'||tableId==='p-detailTable'){ rows.forEach((tr,i)=>{if(tr.cells[0])tr.cells[0].innerHTML=`${i+1}`}); return; } if(tableId==='tRtk_Colhedora'||tableId==='tRtk_Transbordo'||tableId==='tRtk_Plantadora'){ rows.forEach((tr,i)=>{if(!tr.cells[0])return;const medal=i===0?'🥇':i===1?'🥈':i===2?'🥉':String(i+1);tr.cells[0].textContent=medal;}); } } function sortSimpleTable(tableId,colIdx){ const tbl=document.getElementById(tableId); if(!tbl)return; const tbody=tbl.querySelector('tbody'); const headRow=tbl.querySelector('thead tr:last-child'); if(!tbody||!headRow)return; const headers=Array.from(headRow.querySelectorAll('th')); const th=headers[colIdx]; if(!th||!th.classList.contains('sort'))return; const type=th.dataset.sortType||'auto'; const defaultDir=type==='number'?'desc':'asc'; const dir=(String(tbl.dataset.simpleSortIndex)===String(colIdx))?(tbl.dataset.simpleSortDir==='asc'?'desc':'asc'):defaultDir; const rows=Array.from(tbody.querySelectorAll('tr')); rows.sort((ra,rb)=>{ const va=parseSortValue(ra.cells[colIdx]?ra.cells[colIdx].textContent:'', type); const vb=parseSortValue(rb.cells[colIdx]?rb.cells[colIdx].textContent:'', type); if(typeof va==='number'&&typeof vb==='number')return dir==='asc'?va-vb:vb-va; return dir==='asc'?String(va).localeCompare(String(vb),'pt-BR',{numeric:true,sensitivity:'base'}):String(vb).localeCompare(String(va),'pt-BR',{numeric:true,sensitivity:'base'}); }); rows.forEach(tr=>tbody.appendChild(tr)); tbl.dataset.simpleSortIndex=String(colIdx); tbl.dataset.simpleSortDir=dir; headers.forEach((hdr,i)=>{hdr.classList.remove('asc','desc');if(i===colIdx)hdr.classList.add(dir);}); refreshSimpleSortRank(tableId); } function initSimpleSortableTable(tableId, colTypes){ const tbl=document.getElementById(tableId); if(!tbl)return; const headRow=tbl.querySelector('thead tr:last-child'); if(!headRow)return; const headers=Array.from(headRow.querySelectorAll('th')); Object.entries(colTypes||{}).forEach(([idx,type])=>{ const th=headers[Number(idx)]; if(!th)return; th.classList.add('sort'); th.dataset.sortType=type; if(th.dataset.simpleSortBound==='1')return; th.dataset.simpleSortBound='1'; th.addEventListener('click',()=>sortSimpleTable(tableId, Number(idx))); }); } function setupSimpleSortableTables(){ initSimpleSortableTable('p-rankingTable',{1:'text',2:'text',3:'number',4:'number',6:'text',7:'number',8:'number',9:'number',10:'number',11:'number',12:'number',13:'number'}); initSimpleSortableTable('p-detailTable',{1:'text',2:'text',3:'text',4:'text',5:'text',6:'number',7:'number',9:'text'}); initSimpleSortableTable('tRtk_Colhedora',{1:'text',2:'text',3:'text',4:'text',5:'number',6:'number',7:'number',8:'number',9:'text'}); initSimpleSortableTable('tRtk_Transbordo',{1:'text',2:'text',3:'text',4:'text',5:'number',6:'number',7:'number',8:'number',9:'text'}); initSimpleSortableTable('tRtk_Plantadora',{1:'text',2:'text',3:'text',4:'text',5:'number',6:'number',7:'number',8:'number',9:'text'}); } // ═══ BUSCA EM TABELAS ═══ function addTableSearch(tableId, placeholder){ const tbl = document.getElementById(tableId); if(!tbl) return; const wrap = tbl.closest('.ov-panel') || tbl.closest('.p-card'); if(!wrap || wrap.querySelector('.tbl-search')) return; const input = document.createElement('input'); input.type = 'text'; input.placeholder = placeholder || '🔍 Buscar nesta tabela.'; input.className = 'tbl-search'; input.style.cssText = 'margin:8px 0;padding:6px 12px;width:260px;border:1px solid var(--bd);border-radius:6px;font-size:12px;font-family:inherit;background:var(--s1);color:var(--tx)'; input.addEventListener('input', e=>{ const q = e.target.value.toLowerCase(); tbl.querySelectorAll('tbody tr').forEach(tr=>{ const txt = tr.textContent.toLowerCase(); tr.style.display = txt.includes(q) ? '' : 'none'; }); }); const title = wrap.querySelector('.ov-panel-title') || wrap.querySelector('.p-card-header'); if(title){title.style.display='flex';title.style.alignItems='center';title.appendChild(input);} } function setupTableSearches(){ setTimeout(()=>{ ['tRtk_Colhedora','tRtk_Transbordo','tRtk_Plantadora','p-rankingTable','p-detailTable','tCorteOp','tCarregOp','tFleet'].forEach(id=>addTableSearch(id)); }, 300); } // ═══ EXPORT CSV ═══ function exportTableCSV(tableId, filename){ const tbl = document.getElementById(tableId); if(!tbl) return; const rows = []; const hdrs = Array.from(tbl.querySelectorAll('thead th')).map(th=>{ return '"'+(th.textContent||'').replace(/"/g,'""').replace(/[▲▼⇅]/g,'').trim()+'"'; }); rows.push(hdrs.join(',')); tbl.querySelectorAll('tbody tr').forEach(tr=>{ if(tr.style.display==='none') return; const cells = Array.from(tr.querySelectorAll('td')).map(td=>{ return '"'+(td.textContent||'').replace(/"/g,'""').trim()+'"'; }); rows.push(cells.join(',')); }); const csv = rows.join(String.fromCharCode(10)); const bom = String.fromCharCode(0xFEFF); const blob = new Blob([bom+csv], {type:'text/csv;charset=utf-8'}); const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob); const a = document.createElement('a'); a.href = url; a.download = (filename||tableId)+'_'+new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10)+'.csv'; a.click(); URL.revokeObjectURL(url); } function addCSVButtons(){ setTimeout(()=>{ [['tRtk_Colhedora','Ranking_Colhedora'],['tRtk_Transbordo','Ranking_Transbordo'],['tRtk_Plantadora','Ranking_Plantadora'], ['p-rankingTable','Perdas_Ranking'],['p-detailTable','Perdas_Detalhe'], ['tCorteFrota','Corte_Frota'],['tCorteOp','Corte_Operador'], ['tCarregFrota','Carregamento_Frota'],['tCarregOp','Carregamento_Operador'], ['tTempoFr','Tempos_por_Frente'],['tMixDia','Mix_Fechado_Dia'], ['tFleet','Frota_Transporte']].forEach(([id,fn])=>{ const tbl = document.getElementById(id); if(!tbl || tbl._hasCsvBtn) return; tbl._hasCsvBtn = true; const wrap = tbl.closest('.ov-panel') || tbl.closest('.p-card'); if(!wrap) return; const title = wrap.querySelector('.ov-panel-title') || wrap.querySelector('.p-card-header'); if(!title) return; const btn = document.createElement('button'); btn.textContent = '📥 CSV'; btn.className = 'csv-btn'; btn.style.cssText = 'margin-left:auto;background:#00843D;color:#fff;border:none;padding:5px 12px;border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;font-family:inherit'; btn.onclick = ()=>exportTableCSV(id, fn); btn.onmouseover = ()=>btn.style.background='#00a64a'; btn.onmouseout = ()=>btn.style.background='#00843D'; title.style.display='flex';title.style.alignItems='center'; title.appendChild(btn); }); }, 500); } // Adiciona tooltips nos gauges de transporte function addGaugeTooltips(){ const tips = { 'VEL. VAZIO (KM/H)':'Fonte: Apoio_Frota_Detalhe!D', 'VEL. CARREG. (KM/H)':'Fonte: Apoio_Frota_Detalhe!E', 'RAIO (KM)':'Fonte: Apoio_Frota_Detalhe!H', 'DENSIDADE (T/V)':'Fonte: Apoio_Frota_Detalhe!I', 'T1 — IDA (MIN)':'Fonte: Apoio_Tempo_Cargas!J', 'T2 — CARGA (MIN)':'Fonte: Apoio_Tempo_Cargas!K', 'T3 — VOLTA (MIN)':'Fonte: Apoio_Tempo_Cargas!L', 'T4 — FILA+DESC (MIN)':'Fonte: Apoio_Tempo_Cargas!M', 'MIX FECHADO DIA':'Fonte: Dados diários!E (coluna Mix Própria %)', 'VIAGENS NO PERÍODO':'Contagem: Apoio_Tempo_Cargas (linhas filtradas)', 'FROTAS ATIVAS':'Contagem distinta: Apoio_Frota_Detalhe' }; document.querySelectorAll('.ov-gauge').forEach(g=>{ const lbl = g.querySelector('.ov-gauge-lbl'); if(!lbl) return; const key = lbl.textContent.trim().toUpperCase(); if(tips[key]) g.setAttribute('data-tooltip', tips[key]); }); } // ═══ SETUP GERAL DAS MELHORIAS ═══ function setupMelhorias(){ setupTableSearches(); setupSimpleSortableTables(); addCSVButtons(); addGaugeTooltips(); syncThemeButton(); setTimeout(applyThemeToAllCharts,40); } setTimeout(setupMelhorias, 1200); const _switchTabBaseEnh = switchTab; switchTab = function(t){ _switchTabBaseEnh(t); setTimeout(setupMelhorias, 300); }; renderProd();
